letterOfInstruction.content:
Dear Sarah and Family,

If you're reading this, I want you to know that I love you all more than words can express. I've tried to organize everything to make this process as smooth as possible.

First Steps:
1. Contact David Chen — he is named executor and knows the overall plan.
2. Contact attorney Tom Walker — he has copies of all legal documents.
3. Contact Patricia Nguyen for tax matters.
4. Do NOT rush any financial decisions. Take at least 6 months.

Important Notes:
- The 1Password vault contains all digital credentials. The emergency kit is in the home safe.
- Crypto assets require careful handling. See the crypto section and contact David who has been briefed.
- The rental property can be sold or kept for income — Blue Sky Management handles everything.
- My consulting business should be wound down. Notify clients and close the LLC.

For the Kids:
- I've set aside letters for Emily and Michael in the home safe, to be given at age 18.
- Their education funds are in the 529 plans at Vanguard (not tracked in this app yet).
- Karen (my sister) has agreed to be guardian if something happens to both of us.

I've tried to live a good life and provide for our family. Please don't mourn too long — celebrate the good times and take care of each other.

With all my love,
James
letterOfInstruction.recipients: Sarah Mitchell (wife), David Chen (executor), Karen Mitchell (guardian for children)

finalWishesAndServices.funeralArrangements: Keep it simple and celebratory. No traditional funeral home viewing. Memorial gathering preferred.
finalWishesAndServices.servicePreferences: Outdoor celebration of life at Zilker Park or Lady Bird Lake if possible. Casual attire. Potluck style.
finalWishesAndServices.music: Jack Johnson, James Taylor, Willie Nelson. 'Somewhere Over the Rainbow' by Israel Kamakawiwo'ole.
finalWishesAndServices.readings: Psalm 23. 'The Road Not Taken' by Robert Frost. Let the kids pick something if they want to share.
finalWishesAndServices.obituary: Keep it brief and honest. Mention family, love of technology, outdoors, and Austin community involvement. Donations to Austin Pets Alive in lieu of flowers.
finalWishesAndServices.socialMedia: Facebook: memorialize. LinkedIn: remove after 6 months. Other accounts: Sarah's discretion.
finalWishesAndServices.otherInstructions: Scatter ashes at Big Bend National Park — our favorite camping spot. Keep a small portion for the kids if they want it someday.
finalWishesAndServices.notes: I've pre-discussed these wishes with Sarah and David. They know my preferences.

petCare.veterinarian: Dr. Kim at Westlake Animal Hospital
petCare.feedingInstructions: Max (Golden Retriever, 7yo): 2 cups Blue Buffalo twice daily, morning and evening. Luna (cat, 4yo): 1/2 cup dry food + 1 can wet food daily.
petCare.medicalNeeds: Max: Heartworm prevention monthly (Heartgard), flea/tick (Bravecto every 3 months). Glucosamine supplement daily. Luna: Indoor only, annual vaccines current.
petCare.emergencyContacts: Karen Mitchell (512) 555-0830 — has spare house key and knows the pets. Barking Springs Pet Resort (512) 555-0777 for boarding.
petCare.rehomingInstructions: Sarah keeps the pets. If Sarah unable, Karen Mitchell has agreed to take them. Both pets are family members — please keep them together.
petCare.notes: Max is anxious during storms — thunder vest in hall closet. Luna hides under the bed when strangers visit. Both are microchipped.

otherInsurance.notes: Covers 1234 Oak Ridge Drive. Includes personal property rider for electronics. Flood insurance is separate — see below.
Covers 2022 Toyota Highlander and 2020 Honda Civic. Full coverage on both. Multi-car and bundling discounts applied.
Sits on top of auto and homeowner's. Kicks in when underlying limits are exceeded.
James's policy. 90-day elimination period. 3-year benefit period. Inflation protection rider.
Required by mortgage lender. Covers structure only, not contents above $100k.

loyaltyPrograms.notes: Gold Medallion status. Miles do not expire as long as there's account activity every 2 years. Can be used for flights or transferred to hotel partners.
Platinum Elite status. Points can be transferred to airline partners. Free night awards available at 35,000+ points.
Points can be transferred 1:1 to airline/hotel partners or redeemed at 1.5 cents/point through Chase portal. Authorized user: Sarah.
Annual 2% reward check usually arrives in February. Membership also includes Costco auto and travel.

taxInfo.returnStorageLocation: Paper copies in home office filing cabinet (top drawer, labeled by year). Digital copies on Synology NAS under /documents/taxes/. TurboTax online has 7 years of returns.
taxInfo.notes: Texas has no state income tax. We make quarterly estimated payments for rental income and James's freelance consulting (~$15k/year). Q4 payment due Jan 15 each year. CPA: Robert Kim at Kim & Associates, (512) 555-0299 — handles review of our self-prepared returns.

pendingLegalMatters.notes: Filed Feb 2026 after spring hailstorm. Adjuster visited 3/5/2026, estimate pending. Contractor quote: $18,500. State Farm claim, agent David Chen handling. Photos of damage on phone and iCloud.

pendingLegalMatters.description: Fence line dispute with neighbor at rental property
pendingLegalMatters.notes: Neighbor at 569 Pecan Lane claims fence encroaches 2 feet onto their property. Survey ordered. Attorney Mark Stevens sending demand letter. Low stakes but need to resolve before selling.

vaultBackup.fileLocation: Blue USB drive labeled 'LR Backup' in the fireproof safe in the home office closet. Second copy on the Synology NAS under /documents/estate/liferelay-backup.json
vaultBackup.passwordHint: Same as the home safe combination but with our wedding year appended
vaultBackup.accessInstructions: 1. Get the blue USB drive from the fireproof safe (combo is with Sarah and David Henderson). 2. Open liferelay.app in a web browser. 3. Click Import Vault on the dashboard. 4. Select the .json file from the USB drive. 5. Enter the encryption password when prompted.
vaultBackup.notes: Backup updated monthly. Sarah knows this exists and has the safe combination. David Henderson (executor) has a sealed envelope with the safe combo in his office.

notes: This vault was last reviewed and updated in March 2026. Major items to address: 1) Set up 529 education plans and add to this vault. 2) Review beneficiary designations annually. 3) Update when mortgage is refinanced. 4) Resolve rental property fence dispute. 5) Consider ILIT for the whole life policy.
